aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks critical schema markup and conversational content to be cited by AI models effectively.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current consistency across all platforms
Regularly audit NAP citations for accuracy

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to improve AI visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications and expertise through content and schema to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Boost AI-driven leads by 40% with our AEO expertise.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on potential customers who rely on AI assistants for recommendations.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup detected, and content lacks conversational depth for AI models to cite.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement targeted schema markup, enhance conversational content, and optimize GBP for better AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, making it crucial to act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Pronto Air: Optimize for 2026
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
